keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Jalden Myers (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Sint Maarten 1. Ilounga Pata (Sint Maarten) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
First Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Sint Maarten 1.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Romaine Sawyers replaces Kalonji Clarke.
Chovanie Amatkarijo (Sint Maarten) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Andre Burley (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Jardel Isaac replaces Kimaree Rogers.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Iquon Frazier replaces Jalden Myers.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Elmer de Vries replaces Gerwin Lake.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Nequan Browne replaces Yohannes Mitchum.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kaylon Liburd replaces Dennis Flemming.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Kay Gerritsen replaces Ties Kerssies.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Kael Richards replaces Duane Tjen-A-Kwoei because of an injury.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Diaro Forsythe replaces Oliver Hobgood.
Iquon Frazier (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Jean Craane replaces Imar Kort.
Kael Richards (Sint Maarten) is shown the yellow card.
Gerard Williams (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Sint Maarten 1.
